title: 官方拟出新规：外卖平台不得通过长期、大额补贴，扰乱市场秩序；不得强制经营者参加补贴活动 | 原文
content: China's market regulator released draft rules to regulate food delivery platform subsidies on June 17. The rules prohibit platforms from using long-term, large-scale subsidies to disrupt market order and from forcing merchants to participate in subsidy campaigns. The move addresses problems including platforms competing through subsidies and price wars, which harm merchants, delivery workers, consumers, and the real economy while intensifying harmful industry competition.

title: 🖼 马斯克SpaceX正式以600亿美金收购Cursor
content: SpaceX acquired Cursor in a $60 billion stock deal to jointly develop AI models. The companies have been collaborating for months and plan to release a co-trained model on Cursor and Grok Build platforms. Cursor's team will join SpaceX to advance AI technology alongside its existing aerospace operations.

title: AI改变的不是效率，而是饭碗
content: AI threatens white-collar jobs by replacing standardized, digitizable tasks—code generation, writing, design, video production, and data analysis. Rather than immediate mass layoffs, companies will first raise productivity standards, merge roles, and freeze hiring, gradually reducing headcount through attrition. Surviving workers must evolve into four types: augmentation specialists who multiply output with AI; network builders who orchestrate external resources; high-judgment decision-makers who assess quality and risk; and relationship-dependent roles requiring trust and presence. The future organizational model shifts from employment to modular coordination, with individuals becoming lightweight ecosystem nodes rather than fixed employees.

content: An HR reported interviewing a graduate whose resume was AI-generated and who repeatedly consulted the Doubao chatbot during the interview, even asking it what questions to raise. The incident highlights growing reliance on generative AI among job seekers, raising concerns about diminished critical thinking, poor preparation, and lack of genuine engagement in professional settings.

content: An xAI employee accidentally deleted two to three weeks of core training data for Grok's programming product during a data migration, an incident attributed partly to ongoing organizational turmoil. xAI has lost all 11 co-founders and faces mounting departures. The company is racing to catch up in coding AI through its V9 model, Cursor data integration, and allegedly distilling Claude's outputs—prompting Anthropic to block access. Meanwhile, xAI leases its Colossus 1 supercomputing facility to rival Anthropic for approximately $1.25 billion monthly, generating needed revenue amid existential competitive uncertainty.

content: Walmart China announced major executive changes following a regulatory约谈 over food safety issues at Sam's Club. Sam's Club China CMO Zhang Qing resigned; former CPO Neil Maffey will serve as interim replacement. Tony Paladinetti, Walmart International's strategy VP, will join as Walmart China strategy VP in August 2026. Zhu Jun, president of Walmart store operations, will additionally oversee Walmart China's real estate department. The changes aim to strengthen organizational capabilities amid slowing growth and expanding store footprint.

title: 系统治理过程：一个面向线上系统的多维治理模型
content: The material presents a five-layer governance model for online systems. Layer 1 (Application) focuses on decoupled architecture with unidirectional dependencies. Layer 2 (Storage) handles data placement and access patterns. Layer 3 (Observability) implements logging, metrics, and tracing for visibility. Layer 4 (Data Analytics) enables quantified decision-making through data platforms. Layer 5 (Product/Delivery) ensures business alignment. These layers form nested feedback loops: business requirements drive development, runtime generates data, analysis feeds back to product decisions. The core principle is making systems visible, controllable, and evolvable through continuous incremental governance.

title: 企业内部搭满足 10 个人开发用的开源模型，得投多少钱？
content: A user asks whether 500,000 yuan is sufficient to deploy an open-source AI model (GLM-4 or similar) for 10 developers in an enterprise setting. The short answer: likely insufficient for hardware alone. A 10-person team typically needs multiple high-end GPUs (e.g., 8x A100/H100), costing 2–4 million yuan or more, plus servers, networking, storage, and ongoing maintenance. Cloud alternatives may offer lower upfront costs but recurring expenses. Budget constraints suggest exploring smaller models, quantization, or API services instead.

title: 蒋凡“烧钱”封神，无招“烧人”下课
content: Alibaba CEO Wu Yongming appointed two key figures to revive the company: Jiang Fan led e-commerce and Chen Hang (Wugou) led DingTalk. Jiang spent heavily on subsidies—over 100 billion yuan—to grow Taobao Flash Purchase, successfully boosting market share, user activity, and cross-platform integration. Wugou relied on extreme overtime and employee burnout to accelerate DingTalk's AI product development, but his "ONE" project failed, over 300 employees left, and he was removed as CEO after 437 days. The contrasting results highlight different management approaches to corporate transformation.

title: Stop Killing Games fails to secure EU law despite 1.3M signatures
content: The "Stop Killing Games" campaign, which gathered 1.3 million signatures, failed to secure changes to EU law. The European Citizens' Initiative sought to require publishers to keep games functional after ending support. Despite reaching the signature threshold, the European Commission rejected the proposal, stating existing consumer protection laws were sufficient. The campaign highlighted concerns about digital game preservation as online-dependent titles become unplayable when servers shut down.

title: 《凡人修仙传》动画最新两集遭到全网差评，真实原因如何？
content: When *A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality* resumed airing on June 13, 2026, after a 161-day hiatus, its first two new episodes (177-178) drew widespread criticism. Viewers objected to plot changes that weakened the novel's established power dynamics—characters from 200 years ago instantly recognized and casually addressed the now-powerful protagonist without proper deference—and narrative shortcuts like skipped investigation scenes. The director re-released a revised Episode 177 within two days, but simultaneous misinformation falsely blamed a "all-female production team" for quality issues. The director forcefully refuted this gender-based disinformation, attributing production inconsistencies to the significant technical transition from Unreal Engine 4 to 5.

title: 克洛泽是怎么当上世界杯射手王的，梅西为什么踢了这么多年才追上他？
content: Miroslav Klose became the World Cup's top scorer through consistent performance across four tournaments (2002-2014) and a strong supporting German squad that regularly advanced deep into competitions. Lionel Messi took longer to match Klose's 16-goal record partly because Argentina reached fewer finals during his early career, and he played in fewer matches. Messi eventually equaled the record in 2022, benefiting from the tournament's expansion and Argentina's run to the title.

title: SpaceX一分现金没花收购Cursor，马斯克吞下AI编程工具第一名
content: SpaceX will acquire AI coding tool Cursor's parent company Anysphere for $60 billion in an all-stock deal, with no cash involved. Founded by four MIT dropouts in 2022, Cursor reached $4 billion annualized revenue by early 2026, growing from zero to $1 billion in just 18 months—far faster than Slack's seven years. The acquisition completes Musk's strategic computing power consolidation, following SpaceX's February merger with xAI and April option agreement. SpaceX also signed $26 billion annual cloud computing leases with Anthropic and Google, with 90-day termination clauses allowing quick resource reallocation. The deal faces expected antitrust scrutiny, with a $4 billion regulatory termination fee provisioned.

The author analyzed SpaceX's history since its 2002 founding and concluded its potential $3 trillion valuation may not be a bubble. If SpaceX achieves annual profits exceeding 150 billion, the valuation appears reasonable. The author believes this revenue target seems achievable within 5-10 years, making the investment case compelling. The analysis increased admiration for Elon Musk's leadership, understanding why investors support the company despite perceptions of high valuation or speculation.

title: 8点1氪丨连涨3天，SpaceX超越亚马逊跻身全球前五；支付宝启动史上最大改版；微信支付“AI专属卡”最快本周内上线
content: SpaceX's market cap reached $2.65 trillion, surpassing Amazon to become the world's fifth-most valuable company. Alipay launched its biggest-ever redesign with AI assistant "Abao." WeChat Pay is testing "AI Exclusive Card" for payment functions. Other news includes: Sam's China changed chairman; Hikvision will raise hard drive prices July 1 due to AI demand; global EV sales rose for a third consecutive month in May; Yum China acquired Pizza Hut China ownership for $1.2 billion; and XiaoHongShu may pursue a Hong Kong IPO in late 2025.

The text warns against using P/E ratios to value semiconductor stocks like Micron, citing their extreme cyclicality. During the dot-com bubble, Micron's forward P/E appeared cheap at 20x, then 14x, yet the stock collapsed 80% as earnings turned to losses. The pattern repeats: Micron lost $3.8 billion across 2007-2009, then swung between profits and losses repeatedly. The author argues peak earnings are one-time events for cyclical stocks; the best buying opportunity comes after years of heavy losses, as high prices themselves trigger demand destruction, capacity expansion, and technological disruption that end booms.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 泽元投资

title: AI音乐混战，谁能成为“中国版Suno”？
content: Suno raised $400 million in June 2026, reaching a $5.4 billion valuation despite ongoing copyright lawsuits involving over 61,000 tracks. China's AI music market features three player types: tech giants (ByteDance, Tencent, NetEase) offering free tools for ecosystem integration; model developers (Kunlun's Mureka, MiniMax) pursuing direct monetization; and vertical startups targeting niche segments. Testing shows Suno remains superior in composition and vocals, though Mureka leads domestically in commercialization and copyright compliance. Chinese platforms face three major challenges: unclear training data copyright laws, weak consumer payment willingness, and intense overseas competition against Suno's established market position and label partnerships.

content: SpaceX's market value rose 17% to $2.97 trillion, surpassing Microsoft to become the fourth-largest US stock. Apple ranks third at $4.37 trillion. SpaceX options began active trading today, with about 115,000 contracts exchanged in the first 10 minutes and a call-to-put ratio of 1.7:1.

title: DeepSeek 首轮融资或落地，梁文锋个人出资约 200 亿元
content: DeepSeek raised over $7 billion in China's largest single AI funding round, valuing the company above $50 billion. Founder Liang Wenfeng contributed roughly 20 billion yuan personally. The unusual structure gives investors economic rights without voting rights, plus five-year lockups and no board seats. Exceptions include the National AI Industry Investment Fund, which contributed 1 billion yuan with full voting rights and no lockup. Major investors include Tencent (10 billion yuan), CATL (5 billion yuan), NetEase (3 billion yuan), JD.com (3 billion yuan), and IDG Capital (3 billion yuan).

title: 字节跳动的 AI 账本：豆包每天不足百万收入、Seedance 毛利 70%
content: ByteDance's AI chatbot Doubao has over 200 million daily users but generates under 1 million yuan daily, relying mainly on e-commerce commissions while costing tens of millions per day to operate. The company shifted focus to enterprise services, where video generation model Seedance achieves 70% gross margin with 2 billion USD annualized revenue, offsetting Doubao's computing costs. Challenges include Seedance's slowing growth, difficulty monetizing Doubao's user base, and poor domestic willingness to pay for AI services.

title: 小红书最快或下半年赴港上市

The company could list as soon as the second half of 2025.

title: SpaceX 以 600 亿美元股票收购 AI 编程工具公司 Cursor
content: SpaceX and X67 agreed to merge with Anysphere, which operates as Cursor, in a deal valuing Cursor at $60 billion. The transaction, expected to close in Q3 2026, would convert Cursor shares into SpaceX Class A common stock. If terminated under certain conditions, SpaceX must pay Anysphere $4 billion in regulatory-related fees.

title: 央视曝光运营商杀熟乱象，老用户无法享受便宜套餐
content: CCTV exposed telecom operators' price discrimination against loyal customers, where existing users pay higher monthly fees for less data while new users get cheaper plans with more benefits. This practice violates consumers' fair trade rights. Customers can protect themselves by filing complaints through official channels, lodging appeals with regulators, retaining evidence, staying informed about available plans, and using number portability options.

title: [海外]整了一个切换网页端 b 站 cdn 的插件(只有网页端可以! 客户端不行)
content: A browser extension lets overseas users manually switch Bilibili's CDN servers to improve video loading speeds. The creator built it after experiencing slow speeds (200 kbps to 6-7 Mbps improvement), using techniques from a previous NetEase Music project. The plugin intercepts Bilibili's video configuration, tests CDN nodes via XHR, and uses a service worker to route requests to the fastest server. It's available for Chrome web version only, not the client app.

title: What are git worktrees, and why should I use them?
content: Git worktrees, available since 2015, let developers work on multiple branches simultaneously in separate directories without stashing or switching contexts. Unlike traditional branching, worktrees preserve your editor state and eliminate mental overhead during context switches. They've gained popularity recently due to increased parallel work with AI tools and code review culture. Each worktree requires its own dependencies, needs manual cleanup, and cannot checkout identical branches. GitHub Copilot uses worktrees by default for new sessions.

title: 400 只鸭子与田埂上的歌
content: At fourteen, the narrator dropped out of school and began tending 400 ducks with his grandfather. He learned hard lessons: hunger makes ducks and people unruly; managing them demands physical sacrifice, evidenced by bleeding legs from sharp rice stubble. Most enduring was his discovery of singing loudly to combat fear during six-mile walks home through dark fields. After one year, his grandfather sent him to learn a trade. The experience taught him patience, solitude, and self-reliance—skills he later applied across careers from mechanics to coding.
